*** 1 FATAL *** A CAR WAS SWEPT AWAY BY FLOOD WATERS ON SILVER CREEK ROAD. THE CAR AND OCCUPANT WERE FOUND SEPARATELY DOWNSTREAM AND THE OCCUPANT WAS KILLED. THE CAR WAS DESTROYED. TWO OTHER CARS WERE SWEPT AWAY AT THIS SAME LOCATION WITH FOUR TOTAL OCCUPANTS RESCUED.
